svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram id="3W2V7doWKrLtZF-AUOlm" name="YAT Website — HA-hardened, Multi-AZ"> <mxGraphModel dx="1637" dy="558" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="UQUySfhv2dY1S9XiJrn5-1" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1;" value="YAT Website — HA-Hardened Architecture (Multi-AZ · ap-southeast-2 Sydney)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="1300" x="40" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="UQUySfhv2dY1S9XiJrn5-2" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FAFAFA;strokeColor=#BDBDBD;fontSize=11;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=10;spacingTop=8;" value="Legend
━━━ Public HTTPS ingress: Internet → IGW → cross-AZ ALB → web tier
━━━ App → database (MySQL); ══ synchronous RDS replication (auto-failover)
┄┄┄ Egress: web tier → NAT gateway (per AZ); media to/from Amazon S3
Dashed boxes = AWS subnets, one set per Availability Zone (no single-AZ SPOF)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="620" x="40" y="58" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="UQUySfhv2dY1S9XiJrn5-3" parent="1" style="ellipse;shape=cloud;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#546E7A;fontSize=13;" value="Internet
(public visitors · HTTPS)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="180" x="600" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="UQUySfhv2dY1S9XiJrn5-4" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E3F2FD;strokeColor=#1565C0;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=12;spacingTop=8;" value="AWS Region — ap-southeast-2 (Sydney)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="660" width="1240" x="80" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="UQUySfhv2dY1S9XiJrn5-5" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#BBDEFB;strokeColor=#0D47A1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=10;spacingTop=6;" value="VPC 10.0.0.0/16 · DNS resolution + VPC flow logs enabled" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="580" width="1180" x="110" y="245" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="UQUySfhv2dY1S9XiJrn5-6" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFCCBC;strokeColor=#BF360C;fontSize=11;" value="Internet Gateway" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="170" x="140" y="285" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="UQUySfhv2dY1S9XiJrn5-7" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#1565C0;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="Application Load Balancer (cross-AZ)
HTTPS:443 · ACM certificate" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="420" x="470" y="283" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="UQUySfhv2dY1S9XiJrn5-8" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF59D;strokeColor=#F9A825;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="Amazon S3

div.div: YAT Website — HA-Hardened Architecture (Multi-AZ · ap-southeast-2 Sydney)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(250, 250, 250), rgb(22, 22, 22)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(189, 189, 189), rgb(75, 75, 75));

div.div:
Legend
━━━ Public HTTPS ingress: Internet → IGW → cross-AZ ALB → web tier
━━━ App → database (MySQL); ══ synchronous RDS replication (auto-failover)
┄┄┄ Egress: web tier → NAT gateway (per AZ); media to/from Amazon S3
Dashed boxes = AWS subnets, one set per Availability Zone (no single-AZ SPOF)
